mapper.select: SELECT username, COUNT(*) as count, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'success' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as success_count, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'failed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as failed_count FROM sys_operation_log WHERE create_time BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime} GROUP BY username ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 10
SELECT module_name, COUNT(*) as count FROM sys_operation_log WHERE create_time BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime} GROUP BY module_name ORDER BY count DESC
SELECT operation_type, COUNT(*) as count FROM sys_operation_log WHERE create_time BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime} GROUP BY operation_type ORDER BY count DESC

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(create_time, #{groupBy}) as time_key, COUNT(*) as count, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'success' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as success_count, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'failed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as failed_count FROM sys_operation_log WHERE create_time BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime} GROUP BY time_key ORDER BY time_key
